title: Spicy Tender Malaysian Dumplings Stir-fry
description: This dish satisfies midnight cravings with its blend of spicy dried red chillies and tender dumplings, perfect for a diabetic-friendly snack.

ingredients.name: Dumplings
ingredients.notes: Preferably made with gluten-free flour for easy digestion.

ingredients.name: Ground Chicken or Turkey
ingredients.notes: Use lean cuts to keep the dish healthier.

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and spring onions to the pan, stir for 2 minutes.
Fold in ground chicken or turkey along with salt, red chili powder, and optional fish sauce. Stir until fully incorporated and heated through.
Gently submerge dumplings into the cooking mixture using a spoon, adding water as needed to prevent sticking.
Simmer gently for about 5 minutes until the ingredients are well combined and the dumplings are cooked but still tender.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
